mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_jury_invitation (dispute_id, user_id, status, invite_time) VALUES
(#{item.disputeId}, #{item.userId}, 'pending', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ji.*, d.reason, u.nickname AS user_name FROM t_jury_invitation ji LEFT JOIN t_dispute d ON ji.dispute_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON ji.user_id = u.id WHERE ji.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ji.invite_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_jury_invitation WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_jury_invitation SET status = #{status}, vote_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM t_user WHERE credit_score >= 60 AND status = 'active'
AND id NOT IN
#{eid}
ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 20
